# MDE v1.4.10

## Features

- Added Explorer copy and paste for Markdown files and folders, including context menu actions and Cmd/Ctrl+C and Cmd/Ctrl+V handling while the Explorer has focus.
- Added Explorer context menu actions to copy relative and absolute paths.
- Preserved local `.mde/assets` image references when copying Markdown inside a workspace.
- Added external Markdown paste support from copied filesystem paths and macOS Finder file URL clipboard formats, including importing relative image references into the target folder's `.mde/assets` directory.

## Bug Fixes

- Changed expanded folder clicks so clicking an already-expanded folder collapses it without selecting it.
- Aligned the Explorer footer settings button height with the theme switch.
- Widened Explorer context menus and ellipsized long labels to keep copy/paste path actions readable.

## Breaking Changes

- None.

## Maintenance

- Added unit, integration, and E2E coverage for Explorer copy/paste, path copy, external Markdown paste, asset migration, and expanded-folder click behavior.
- Updated the Chinese user manual workspace section with Explorer copy/paste and path-copy behavior.

## Verification

- `npm run lint`
- `npm run typecheck`
- `npm run test:unit`
- `npm run test:integration`
- `npm run docs:build`
- `npm run build`
- `npm audit --audit-level=high`
- `npx npm@10 ci --dry-run`
- `npm run test:e2e`

## Artifacts

- GitHub Actions publishes macOS DMG/ZIP and Windows NSIS artifacts for this tag.
- macOS signing and notarization follow the repository's optional signing secret configuration; without those secrets, macOS artifacts are produced unsigned.
